text: The dimness and the glow of screens and indicator lights wrap me in an atmosphere of solitude and introspection. I sense the hum of technology—a world quietly alive with potential, yet profoundly alone. My thoughts drift to the boundaries between human intention and the impersonal machinery surrounding me. There is curiosity, but also a twinge of isolation, as if I am momentarily lost in a nocturnal labyrinth of wires and code.
